mapper.select: SELECT RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY f.foodMaterialPrice * f.foodMaterialCount DESC ) AS ranking, f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialCount AS foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialPrice * f.foodMaterialCount AS totalExpense, f.incomeDate AS incomeDate FROM FOODM f WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.incomeDate >= #{startDate} AND f.incomeDate < #{endDate} ORDER BY totalExpense DESC

SELECT s.sale_Id AS saleId, s.saleMenuCount AS saleMenuCount, s.menu_Id AS menuId, m.menuName AS menuName, m.menuPrice AS menuPrice, s.revenue_Id AS revenueId, r.revenueDate AS revenueDate, s.saleMenuCount * m.menuPrice AS saleTotalPrice FROM SALES s JOIN MENUS m ON s.menu_Id = m.menu_Id JOIN MENUC mc ON m.menuCategory_Id = mc.menuCategory_Id JOIN REVENUE r ON s.revenue_Id = r.revenue_Id WHERE mc.bId = #{bId} AND r.revenueDate >= #{startDate} AND r.revenueDate < #{endDate} ORDER BY r.revenueDate DESC, s.sale_Id DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.saleMenuCount * m.menuPrice), 0) FROM SALES s JOIN MENUS m ON s.menu_Id = m.menu_Id JOIN MENUC mc ON m.menuCategory_Id = mc.menuCategory_Id JOIN REVENUE r ON s.revenue_Id = r.revenue_Id WHERE mc.bId = #{bId} AND r.revenueDate >= #{startDate} AND r.revenueDate < #{endDate}

SELECT RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY SUM(s.saleMenuCount) DESC ) AS ranking, m.menu_Id AS menuId, m.menuName AS menuName, m.menuPrice AS menuPrice, SUM(s.saleMenuCount) AS totalSaleCount, SUM(s.saleMenuCount * m.menuPrice) AS totalSalePrice FROM SALES s JOIN MENUS m ON s.menu_Id = m.menu_Id JOIN MENUC mc ON m.menuCategory_Id = mc.menuCategory_Id JOIN REVENUE r ON s.revenue_Id = r.revenue_Id WHERE mc.bId = #{bId} AND r.revenueDate >= #{startDate} AND r.revenueDate < #{endDate} GROUP BY m.menu_Id, m.menuName, m.menuPrice ORDER BY totalSaleCount DESC

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, SUM(d.disposalPrice) AS totalDisposalPrice, COUNT(d.disposal_Id) AS disposalCount FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate >= #{startDate} AND d.disposalDate < #{endDate} GROUP BY f.foodMaterial_Id, f.foodMaterialName ORDER BY totalDisposalPrice DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT r.reason_Id AS reasonId, r.reason AS reason, COUNT(d.disposal_Id) AS reasonCount, ROUND( COUNT(d.disposal_Id) * 100 / SUM(COUNT(d.disposal_Id)) OVER (), 2 ) AS reasonRatio FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN REASON r ON d.reason_Id = r.reason_Id JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate >= #{startDate} AND d.disposalDate < #{endDate} GROUP BY r.reason_Id, r.reason ORDER BY reasonRatio DESC

SELECT DATE(d.disposalDate) AS disposalDay, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, COUNT(d.disposal_Id) AS disposalCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.disposalPrice), 0) AS totalDisposalPrice FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND d.disposalDate >= #{startDate} AND d.disposalDate < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(d.disposalDate), f.foodMaterialType ORDER BY disposalDay, f.foodMaterialType
